Title: Visualizza la AQI in tempo reale
Preconditions: User has selected a location
Test Steps:
1. User selects a location on the application interface.
2. Application retrieves real-time air quality index (AQI) data via API.
3. Application displays the AQI value for the selected location.
Expected Result: The application correctly displays the real-time AQI value for the selected location.

Title: Sistema di notifica
Preconditions: User has granted permission to send notifications and air quality threshold is exceeded
Test Steps:
1. Air quality threshold is exceeded.
2. Application sends a notification to the user.
Expected Result: The user receives a notification informing them of the change in air quality.
